title: SQLancer crash on complex join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INT, b VARCHAR(255), c BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE), (2, 'example', NULL), (3, 'sample', FALSE);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT a, b, CAST(c AS CHAR) AS c_str FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(v1.a, 0) + IFNULL(CAST(t1.b AS UNSIGNED), 0)) FROM v1 LEFT JOIN t1 ON (v1.c_str LIKE CONCAT('%', t1.b, '%'));
CREATE TABLE t2 (x DOUBLE, y DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
key_bug_features: full outer join with complex view and cast operations
